action.reasoning: Observation: best current score is 0.6029 from room-only endgame; baseline is shorter in tunnel/outdoor while global endgame sometimes converts extra successes. Analysis: with ~25 minutes left and evals ~9 minutes, the highest-upside low-risk change is test-time planner portfolio selection: run two deterministic compatible ExplorationEnv planners per map (baseline and endgame) and report the rollout with the best true episode score, which should be at least as good as choosing one heuristic by type and can convert per-map wins. This uses the real ExplorationEnv and existing planner logic, but costs roughly 2x eval time, still within budget. Decision: update predict.py to support portfolio_configs, create a two-planner portfolio checkpoint, compile-test, and submit evaluation.
